kept.text:
Programming languages behind famous platforms 

-𝕏 (Twitter) – Scala, Java, Ruby on Rails
-Facebook – Hack (PHP), C++, Python
-YouTube – Python, C++, Go, Java
-Google – C++, Go, Python, Java
-Instagram – Python (Django)
-TikTok – Go, Python, C++
-Netflix – Java, Python, Node.js
-Amazon – Java, C++, Perl
-LinkedIn – Java, Scala
-Pinterest – Python (Django), Elixir
-WhatsApp – Erlang
-Reddit – Python, Go
-Spotify – Java, Python, C++
-Wikipedia – PHP
-GitHub – Ruby on Rails, Go
-Airbnb – Ruby on Rails, Java
-Canva – Java, Python
-Twitch – Go
-Snapchat – C++, Java, Python
-Discord – Elixir, Python, Rust, Go
-Uber – Go, Java, Node.js
-PayPal – Java, JavaScript
-Stripe – Ruby, Java, Go
-Shopify – Ruby on Rails
-Telegram – C++, Java, Kotlin

kept.text:
Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, bahkan Netflix punya akun X. Tapi X gak punya akun di mana-mana.

Setiap kali platform lain posting di X, artinya "Kalau mau diskusi yang penting, ya tetep di sini."
X gak perlu hadir di medsos lainnya. Karena medsos lain yang butuh X.

Startegi Destination platform. Gak promosi di tempat lain, tapi kalau kamu mau jadi tempatnya, semua orang datang. Supermarket gak jualan di warung. Warung yang pasang spanduk nama supermarket.

X Ingin Jadi "The Town Square"
Elon Musk secara eksplisit menyebut X sebagai public square — tempat semua diskusi penting terjadi. Kalau X punya akun di TikTok, itu artinya mengakui bahwa ada "town square lain" yang lebih relevan untuk sebagian konten.

Tapi ya kita lihat saja strateginya belum sepenuhnya berhasil. Banyak brand advertiser kabur. Threads sama Bluesky malah tumbuh.

kept.text:
3) AI Netflix: Movie + series concierge

Prompt:
“Act as my movie & series concierge.
My mood right now: [funny / scary / thrilling / emotional / comfort].
I prefer: [languages / age ratings / genres].
Give me:
• 10 free movies
• 5 free series or mini‑series
For each, include:
• Where I can watch it legally for free (platform or region‑specific options if possible)
• 2‑sentence emotional pitch for why I’ll love it
• 1 alternative if I don’t like that pick.
Then sort the list into: ‘Tonight’, ‘This Week’, ‘Rainy Weekend’.”

kept.text:
4) Weekly “Netflix grid” schedule (YouTube only)

Prompt:
“Act as a streaming platform programmer.
Create a 7‑day ‘Netflix‑style’ schedule using only YouTube.
My interests: [e.g., comedy, tech, self‑improvement, documentaries, anime].
For each day, give me:
• 3–4 ‘slots’ (Morning, Afternoon, Evening, Late Night)
• 1–2 channels or playlists per slot
• Exact search terms to find them
• The ‘vibe’ of that slot (light, deep, background, intense).
Make sure the week feels balanced between fun, learning, and chill.”

kept.text:
#ลูกหมีซอนญ่า 
#LMSY #AffairtheSeries 

Finally started watching Affair on Netflix for the first time after finishing Harmony Secret recently.

Watching Thai GL on Netflix simply offers a better viewing experience. The colours look richer, the subtitles are cleaner and easier to follow and the audio feels much smoother with better dialogue and music balance. Compared to part by part uploads on YouTube, everything feels far more polished.

I really hope Hometown Romance makes its way to Netflix after it finishes airing on the main streaming platforms.
